item.title: Jan Rys-Rozsévač
item.description: Jan Rys-Rozsévač (1 November 1901 – 27 June 1946) was a Czech journalist and politician. He was the leader of fascist organisation Vlajka.

item.title: Pješčanica
item.description: Pješčanica (Serbian Cyrillic: Пјешчаница)[1] is a village in central Croatia, in the municipality of Gvozd, Sisak-Moslavina County. It is connected by the D6 highway.

item.title: Pasquale Orsini
item.description: Pasquale Orsini (born 1970) is an Italian palaeographer, librarian, and Professor from Università di Catania-Siracusa.

item.title: Harpalus providens
item.description: Harpalus providens is a species of ground beetle in the subfamily Harpalinae.[1] It was described by Casey in 1914.[1]

item.title: Louis Thevenet
item.description: Louis François Joseph Marie Thevenet (12 February 1874 in Bruges – 16 August 1930 in Halle) was a Belgian painter. He is best known for interior portraits and still-lifes.
